name: 4603 Lennox Dr — 2BR
notes: Furnished 2BR. $2,000/mo. STR license pending. Landlord permission in writing. Austin 78745.

name: 4603 Lennox Dr — 4BR
notes: Furnished 4BR. $2,495/mo. Best unit in the deal. SXSW will pay a month's rent in 4-5 nights. Austin 78745.

name: Nashville — Market
notes: Top arbitrage market. $190-300/night. Party tourism. Target: 2BR near Music Row or East Nashville.

name: Columbus — Market
notes: Lowest rent of any market ($1,420). OSU games. No STR restrictions. Target: Short North or German Village.

name: Orlando — Market
notes: Disney area. 75%+ occupancy. $175-300/night. High rent but high revenue ceiling.

name: Phoenix — Market
notes: State law protects STRs. Spring training. $180-280/night. Target: 2-3BR near downtown or Biltmore.

name: Atlanta — Market
notes: Corporate demand fills weeknights. $150-230/night. Midtown or Old Fourth Ward.

name: Memphis — Market
notes: Lowest entry cost. $120-170/night. Music tourism. TN state law protects STRs.

name: Kansas City — Market
notes: Very permissive. No STR restrictions. $130-180/night. Chiefs/World Cup 2026 potential.

name: San Antonio — Market
notes: Riverwalk tourism. No restrictions. $140-200/night. Affordable Austin alternative.

name: Charlotte — Market
notes: Banking hub. $145-210/night. Corporate demand. NoDa or South End.

name: Tampa — Market
notes: Fastest growing FL metro. $160-250/night. St. Pete is hot. Higher rent but strong demand.

name: Gulf Shores — Market
notes: No STR restrictions. Beach tourism. $180-280/night. Strong seasonal peaks.
